_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With the score moving ±2+ points in 0 of the last 43 windows, this is a tight coil where HOLD is the statistically honest default until a definitive breaker appears.
next_move.brains_agree: No. The analyst calls for a HOLD based on structural divergence and 0% transition accuracy, while the narrative writer implies a looming upside breakout via quiet accumulation.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 with btc_momentum_30d breaking below 40 and funding compressing to sub-35
next_move.invalidated_if: etf_flows sustain above 90 with btc_momentum_30d clearing 60 and stablecoin_growth breaking above 60
